title: Visual Stews
description: Colors Suspicious Stews based on their effect, and shows the crafting flower on top to make them instantly recognizable.
body:
# 🌻 Better Effects and Flower Crafting

This texture pack for Suspicious Stews adds a unique visual touch to the game: the flowers used to craft the stew are visible inside, as if soaked in the broth. Additionally, the stew changes color depending on the effect it grants the player. For example, the stew that gives Saturation is yellow and contains flowers like the Dandelion or Blue Orchid, which can be used in crafting. A creative way to easily identify the effects of each stew!

## 🔍 Practical example

To better understand the pack you can just look at its logo:

![No-BG Visual Stews Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d37766b8713cab4392a8bcc2364b8c173a83837.png)

The purple part will be the flower used to craft the stew, the blue part will be what effect it will give to the player and the orange part will only be aesthetic.

You can find every stew in the gallery.

(Source: [Minecraft Wiki](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Suspicious_Stew))

Check out this resource-pack's collection: [here](https://modrinth.com/collection/ldN6hLmX)!

# ❓ FAQ

### 📂 Using Parts of This Resource Pack

Regarding parts created by me, whether they are textures, models, sounds, or any other elements, proper credit must be given when using them. This means that you must clearly credit the original creator (myself) and provide a visible link to the official Modrinth page where the resource-pack can be downloaded.

This applies to all uses, including streaming, video content, and any form of public content creation. Proper attribution ensures the recognition of the original work and allows others to discover and explore the resource-pack.

### 📦 Using the Entire Resource Pack

You are allowed to use the entire resource-pack publicly, including in projects, servers, or other public uses. While proper credit to the original creator (myself) with a visible link to the official Modrinth page is **strongly appreciated** when the pack is used in full, it is not strictly required. However, this does not grant permission to re-upload or redistribute the resource-pack on any platform or website without explicit consent.

Any attempt to republish the resource-pack as your own or distribute it through unauthorized channels is strictly prohibited. If you wish to modify or share the resource-pack in any way, please contact me for approval. The goal is to ensure that the resource-pack remains under proper control and that all creators are respected for their work.

### ⚖️ Consequences of Non-Compliance

Failure to respect these guidelines may initially result in a polite request for compliance. However, if these conditions are not followed, it will lead to the total removal of the content in question.

# 🛠️ Compatibility & Requirements

Starting from version **1.2.0**, this pack offers full support for *Minecraft 1.21.5 and above*, leveraging the new vanilla system to dynamically update suspicious stew textures without requiring any mods.

For users on versions earlier than 1.21.5, please use **version 1.1.0** of the pack together with **OptiFine** or **CIT Resewn** to enable the dynamic textures.


> ⚠️ **Note:** Version 1.1.0 is no longer supported and may not receive updates or texture changes due to ongoing improvements and optimizations in newer versions.


Be sure to select the version that fits your Minecraft setup to get the best experience!
